verdict: An incredibly fun, vocal-synced chart with great energy, held back by a few physically impossible 3-panel hold oversights.

issues.problem: Tapping D while both L and R are held (HOLD R from 39.763 to 40.469, HOLD L from 40.116 to 41.528) requires three feet, which is physically impossible on a standard pad without using hands or awkward bracketing.
Tapping R (and U at 75.597) while both D and L are held (HOLD D from 73.655 to 75.774, HOLD L from 75.068 to 75.774) creates another physically impossible 3-panel situation.
The rapid R -> D -> U sequence at 170 BPM forces either a very fast, uncomfortable double-step or a full 360-degree spin, which is highly demanding for a standard Hard chart.
